basics.description:
## Azure Virtual Desktop Lab
This template deploys a fully configured 2-VM AVD environment including:
- **Pooled Host Pool** with 2 Entra ID-joined session hosts
- **FSLogix** profile containers via Azure Files Premium v2
- **NAT Gateway** for secure outbound internet (no public IPs on VMs)
- **Private Endpoint** for storage (all FSLogix traffic stays on the VNet)
- **Intune auto-enrolment** for the AVD Devices group

---
**Pre-requisites before deploying:**
- A golden VM image (Managed Image or Shared Image Gallery version)
- An Entra ID group called **AVD Users** containing your users
- An Entra ID group called **AVD Devices** (for Intune policy targeting)

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Region where all resources will be deployed.

basics.name: prefix
basics.label: Resource prefix
basics.toolTip: Short prefix applied to all resource names, e.g. 'avd-lab' produces avd-lab-vnet, avd-lab-hp, etc.

constraints.validationMessage: 3–15 characters, lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only.

options.text: Select the golden image you prepared for the session hosts. This can be a Managed Image or a Shared Image Gallery version.

elements.name: goldenImageId
elements.label: Golden image
elements.toolTip: Select your prepared Managed Image. For Shared Image Gallery versions, use the text box below instead.

elements.name: goldenImageIdOverride
elements.label: Or enter a Shared Image Gallery version resource ID
elements.toolTip: Paste the full resource ID of a SIG image version if you are not using a Managed Image. Leave blank if you selected an image above.

elements.name: vmCount
elements.label: Number of session hosts
elements.toolTip: How many session host VMs to deploy into the host pool.

elements.name: vmSize
elements.label: VM size
elements.toolTip: Size for each session host VM. D-series v5 recommended for AVD.

toolTip.username: Local admin account created on each session host.
toolTip.password: Must meet Azure VM password complexity requirements.

constraints.customValidationMessage: Password must be at least 12 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character.

options.text: The AVD Users group will be granted 'Desktop Virtualization User' on the App Group and SMB access to the FSLogix file share. The AVD Devices group is used for Intune policy targeting and does not require any configuration here.

elements.name: avdUsersGroupId
elements.label: AVD Users group Object ID
elements.toolTip: The Object ID of your 'AVD Users' Entra ID security group. Find it in Entra ID > Groups > AVD Users > Overview.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid GUID in the format xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx.

options.text: FSLogix profiles are stored on an Azure Files Premium v2 share accessed via a Private Endpoint. The share quota is calculated automatically from the values below. Azure Files Premium has a minimum share size of 100 GB.

elements.name: fslogixProfileSizeGB
elements.label: Profile size per user (GB)
elements.toolTip: Maximum size of each user's FSLogix profile VHDX. This is also written to the VMs as the FSLogix SizeInMBs registry value.

elements.name: fslogixUserCount
elements.label: Number of users
elements.toolTip: Total number of users who will have FSLogix profiles. Used to calculate the required file share quota.

options.text: [concat('Calculated share quota: ', string(max(mul(steps('fslogix').fslogixProfileSizeGB, steps('fslogix').fslogixUserCount), 100)), ' GB  (', string(steps('fslogix').fslogixProfileSizeGB), ' GB × ', string(steps('fslogix').fslogixUserCount), ' users', if(less(mul(steps('fslogix').fslogixProfileSizeGB, steps('fslogix').fslogixUserCount), 100), ' — minimum 100 GB applied)', ')'))]

elements.name: storageAccountSku
elements.label: Storage redundancy
elements.toolTip: LRS is sufficient for a lab. ZRS provides zone redundancy for production.

options.text:
[concat('**Deployment summary**

**Region:** ', location(), '
**Prefix:** ', basics('prefix'), '
**Session hosts:** ', string(steps('sessionHosts').vmSection.vmCount), ' × ', steps('sessionHosts').vmSection.vmSize, '
**FSLogix share:** ', string(max(mul(steps('fslogix').fslogixProfileSizeGB, steps('fslogix').fslogixUserCount), 100)), ' GB (', string(steps('fslogix').fslogixProfileSizeGB), ' GB × ', string(steps('fslogix').fslogixUserCount), ' users)
**Storage SKU:** ', steps('fslogix').storageAccountSku)]
